message_text: The vending machine on the ground floor is being replaced. It should be back in service by Wednesday.
We've noticed unusual login activity on your account. Please reset your password immediately.
We need to resolve the discrepancy in last month's expense report before finance closes the books on Wednesday.
The API endpoint for the payments service is returning 503 errors. This is affecting live transactions.
The fire alarm test scheduled for Thursday has been postponed to the following week.
The data protection team needs all departments to complete the updated DPIA form by end of next week.
New recycling bins have been placed next to each printer station.
Apologies for the short notice — the supplier needs the signed purchase order returned by close of business today.
Can you update the client contact spreadsheet? A couple of the phone numbers are out of date.
Your desk phone extension has been changed to 4417. No action needed on your end.
We need someone to take minutes at the governance meeting on Thursday. Any volunteers?
Payroll will be processed one day early this month due to the bank holiday.
Team lunch is booked for next Friday at 12:30. Let me know of any dietary requirements.
Just flagging that the shared drive migration completed successfully over the weekend. All files should be accessible.
The training session on inclusive hiring practices is next Wednesday at 2pm. Registration is open on the HR portal.
Could you chase the catering company? We still don't have confirmation for the event on the 20th and it's in five days.
